title: Keo Create Optimized
description: Keo Create Optimized is a carefully curated modpack that delivers a smooth, vanilla+ experience with a central focus on Create: Aeronautics
body:
![logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/735a0fe4cd4e41176dfda83a247e4903e5d73e02.png)



**Keo Create Optimized** adds a complete and polished experience centered around **Create: Aeronautics**, the new expansion that lets you build and fly airplanes, airships, hot air balloons, and other flying contraptions.
It combines the core Create mod with the best compatible addons, while including carefully chosen vanilla+ mods that enhance exploration, building, and quality of life — _all without bloating the game or sacrificing performance._

![create](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7d5da848711394ae06d172971be16ba2b575d853.jpeg)

**If you love Create and want to fully enjoy the new Aeronautics features without lag or modpack overload**, this is the perfect pack for you.
It gives you an immersive, fun, and fluid experience where you can build epic flying machines, automate factories, and explore the world — all while maintaining excellent performance and a vanilla-friendly atmosphere.
Whether you want to soar through the skies in your own airplane or create massive airships, Keo Create Optimized delivers a clean, well-balanced, and highly enjoyable way to experience the future of Create.

**What features does it have?**

- Strong focus on Create: Aeronautics — The main feature of the pack. Build and fly your own aircraft with realistic physics and advanced mechanics.
- Optimized Create Ecosystem — Hand-picked Create addons for better logistics, processing, decoration, and automation.
- Smooth Vanilla+ Experience — Quality-of-life mods that improve the base game while keeping the classic Minecraft feel.
- Excellent Performance — Extremely well optimized for high and stable FPS, even with large contraptions and flying machines. Ideal for mid and low-end PCs.
- Lightweight & Clean — No unnecessary mods. Only what enhances the experience.
